name: Provocative
overview: Former socialite and much-reviled Tess (Roz Pho), is released from 10 years of imprisonment for attempting to poison her wealthy husband. She's now back to atone for the past, retrieve her children and find out the truth of who framed her. Nadrah (Adlina Adil), a successful doctor, is blindsided by her husband's request to bring another woman into their marriage. Venya (Eswari Gunasagar), with a mysterious past, is intent on burying her dark secrets as she rebuilds a new life for herself.  They vow to be each other’s guardian angels, weathering storms and becoming stronger, better people together.

trailers.title: 𝙢𝙚𝙚𝙩 𝙏𝙚𝙨𝙨. 🩸ten years ago, they stripped away her life, her family and her name... #Provocative
